text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I won't let my fans down! I'm... I'm going to win!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: HYAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: No! I am the protagonist of this tale!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: HRAAAHHH!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(Unsatisfied and unable to eat, my body felt
dreary, cold... almost empty)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (But now... there's heat!)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... can still go on.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I can keep running! Farther, harder... faster!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Faster!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Ngh.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAHH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She had always been a solemn
Umamusume—silently bound to realizing her
self-imposed duty. But now, for the first time...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She burns like a bold and brilliant flame.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It's still... hot.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(My throat, my chest... it feels like they're
burning.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (Is this the same heat I felt during my debut race? Is this... your heat?)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (It has to be, right? It has to be...)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even though she didn't win first place, Admire
Vega achieves a great result in the Classic Triple
Crown's Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that her appetite seems to be recovering, I
can assume our preparations for the Japanese
Derby will run smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And surprisingly...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
choice_data_list:
Hey, Ayabe. You know we're finished for today,
right?

Hey, Ayabe. You know we're finished for today,
right?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Oh... yeah. I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
It's not enough. I'll never catch up to Opera O
and Ayabe at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But... the Derby! That's where I'll beat both of
them!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
How much faster will she get by the time the Derby
comes around?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Will our next race be even better than—

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I'm heading back. Thanks for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Little by little...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm seeing her competitive spirit emerge.
choice_data_list: (It's certainly a change for the better.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Winning for her sister is meaningful in itself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But through running, she's found rivals and
discovered the joy of competition. Even better,
she's discovering herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my way home one day, my attention suddenly
turns to the sky.
choice_data_list: The weather's been pretty bleak lately.
The weather's been pretty bleak lately.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which...
choice_data_list:
I wonder if Admire Vega's been able to go
stargazing recently.

I wonder if Admire Vega's been able to go
stargazing recently.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cloudy days continue as we begin training for
the Japanese Derby.
